title: Docker CLI Check
description: Verify the Docker engine CLI on this training host. Run docker version and record that the check succeeded—work directly in the lab terminal.
tasks: Run docker version (client and server sections)
Create the check marker file at /tmp/docker-cli-checked

objectivesPublic.label: Run docker version
objectivesPublic.text: Confirm the Docker CLI responds without errors.
objectivesPublic.hint: If the client cannot reach the daemon, check whether you need elevated privileges or group membership on this host.

objectivesPublic.label: Record the check
objectivesPublic.text: Leave proof in /tmp that the version check succeeded.
objectivesPublic.hint: An empty file under /tmp is enough once docker version exits cleanly.
